response.reasoning: Bogdan has 14+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. His current role at re:cinq is directly on-point: full-stack TypeScript/Node.js work plus AI-agent infrastructure with MCP frameworks, which maps cleanly to the job's AI agent development requirement. Previous roles demonstrate sustained depth in Node.js (WatchUp, RIDE Capital, GISCollective), TypeScript and React (Optilyz with AWS CDK and MongoDB), and cloud/container work (Docker throughout, Kubernetes at GISCollective, AWS CDK at Optilyz). He holds a BS in Computer Science. TDD and testing culture is deeply embedded across multiple roles and even personal projects (Fluent-Asserts library, Trial test runner), though the specific frameworks listed in the JD (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not explicitly called out. Nest.js is a notable gap — it is the primary backend framework in the JD and does not appear anywhere in the resume. Kotlin is listed as a secondary requirement; Java is present in his skills but Kotlin is absent. Authentication/authorization/security practices are not explicitly addressed. Overall, this is a strong profile with a few specific technology gaps that are easily clarifiable.
strengths: 14+ years of hands-on full-stack engineering with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) demonstrated across multiple production roles
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role (re:cinq), directly matching the JD's AI agent development requirement
Deep testing culture evidenced by TDD advocacy across every senior role, building open-source testing libraries, and running TDD workshops — signals high code quality standards
concerns: Nest.js — the primary backend framework in the JD — is not mentioned anywhere in the resume; unclear if he has worked with it or would need ramp-up time
Specific test frameworks listed in the JD (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are absent by name; his testing experience is strong in principle but framework familiarity is unconfirmed
Kotlin is not listed in skills or any role despite being called out as a secondary technology; only Java is present, and only in embedded/robotics contexts rather than backend services

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned Staff-level full-stack engineer whose current work at re:cinq aligns closely with this role — same core stack, same AI-agent tooling angle, same internal developer tooling context. The main uncertainty is Nest.js familiarity, which is the JD's stated primary backend framework; a brief technical screen would quickly clarify whether he has adjacent experience or needs onboarding. Everything else — seniority, polyglot range, testing discipline, cloud/container fluency, and AI agent work — lands squarely in the target range.
